metadata.license: Datasheet-derived parametric B&W model authored for the Spektrafilm Support extension (GPL-3.0-or-later). Models a neutral silver emulsion as three identical layers + neutral dye in the spektrafilm engine (https://github.com/andreavolpato/spektrafilm). NOT a measured spectral trace; sensitivity and characteristic-curve SHAPES follow published Kodak/Ilford/Fuji datasheet classes. See tools/make_bw_profiles.py.
metadata.datasource: Hand-modelled from published B&W film/paper datasheet curve shapes.
